zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hughes於1805年出生在美國田納西州雷亞時，他的父親Hardeman Hughes31歲，母親Sinthia Cook31歲。他和Matilda Clingman至少有7個兒子和4個女兒。他於1850年住在美國阿肯色州卡羅爾達爾 堂史普。他去世於1860年在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林德 洛奇享年55歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林德 洛奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: Making States Equal
historicEvents.description: The Missouri Compromise helped provide the entrance of Maine as a free state and Missouri as a slave state into the United States. As part of the compromise, slavery was prohibited north of the 36°30′ parallel, excluding Missouri.
Historical Boundaries - 1829: Hot Spring, Arkansas Territory, United States; 1836: Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States

historicEvents.title: Remember the Alamo
historicEvents.description: Being a monumental event in the Texas Revolution, The Battle of the Alamo was a thirteen-day battle at the Alamo Mission near San Antonio. In the early morning of the final battle, the Mexican Army advanced on the Alamo. Quickly being overrun, the Texian Soldiers quickly withdrew inside the building. The battle has often been overshadowed by events from the Mexican–American War, But the Alamo gradually became known as a national battle site and later named an official Texas State Shrine.
Historical Boundaries - 1847: Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States

en.lifeSummary: When William Hughes was born in 1805, in Rhea, Tennessee, United States, his father, Hardeman Hughes, was 31 and his mother, Sinthia Cook, was 31. He had at least 7 sons and 4 daughters with Matilda Clingman. He lived in Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, United States in 1850. He died in 1860, in De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 55, and was buried in De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States.

Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles avec Matilda Clingman. Il a vécu à Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1850. ja.lifeSummary: William Hughesが1805年にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州ルヒーで生まれた時，父Hardeman Hughesは31歳，母Sinthia Cookは31歳であった。彼はMatilda Clingmanとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州カーロルセダー トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼は1860年にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングド ロチェで55歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングド ロチェにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Hughes(이)가 1805년 미국 테네시 주 리아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hardeman Hughes(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Sinthia Cook(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Matilda Clingman(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 아칸소 주 카로 세더르 타운시프에서 살았다. 그는 1860년 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 데 록헤에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 데 록헤에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hughes родился в 1805 г. в местности реа, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Hardeman Hughes было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sinthia Cook, 31. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери от Matilda Clingman. Он жил в местности кедар тоуншип, карролл, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году. Он умер в 1860 г. в местности де рош, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности де рош, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.
